TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kanao‚Äôpu, title = Kanao‚Äôpu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kanao‚Äôpu} }

S.FORM: Kanao'pu Itiniay i Luye Cen no Taitung ko Kanao'pu a niyaro', 363 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 884 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 28% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 244 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 72% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 640 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 24%, Bunun 1%, roma 2%.
S.PHON: kanao~u °po~u~u itiniaj i …ĺo~u~uj…ô ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u kanao~u °po~u~u a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Kanao'pu Itiniay i Luye Cen no Taitung ko Kanao'pu a niyaro', 363 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 884 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 28% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 244 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 72% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 640 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 24%, Bunun 1%, roma 2%.
